title: Performance Audit System (Revised)
overview: Add four new commands to browse (initscript, coverage, detect, perf-audit) that give AI coding agents the ability to fully diagnose web performance bottlenecks on any website. Detects 108 frameworks with version/config/build-mode depth, 55 SaaS platforms with app enumeration and constraint mapping, collects Core Web Vitals via pre-navigation observers, measures JS/CSS coverage, reconstructs the critical rendering path, and produces a structured report separating fixable issues from platform limitations.

referenceDocuments.purpose: 108 framework detection signatures with detection expressions, version extraction, config depth, and perf disease detection
55 SaaS platform detection signatures with app enumeration, constraint mapping, and platform metrics

scopeChallenge: Existing code has perf (navigation timing), network (request log), BrowserManager.setInitScript() (internal), react-devtools (React profiling), and js/eval (arbitrary JS). No coverage, no framework detection beyond React, no perf-audit. Chose EXPANSION because detection database depth is the differentiating moat. Key data source decision: use Resource Timing API via page.evaluate() for infrastructure/resource analysis (richer than NetworkEntry). Ruled out: Lighthouse integration, performance budgets, tracking/diff, modifying NetworkEntry struct.

failureModes.risk: Init script conflicts with domain filter init script
failureModes.mitigation: Both use IIFE pattern with separate namespaces. Domain filter wraps WebSocket/EventSource. Web vitals stores on window.__BROWSE_PERF_METRICS. Test both active in TASK-017.

failureModes.risk: Coverage API unavailable in headless mode
failureModes.mitigation: Playwright Coverage works in Chromium headless (confirmed). If unavailable, startCoverage() throws clear error, perf-audit skips gracefully.
Each detector verifies presence (React hook must have renderers.size > 0). Each wrapped in try/catch. Test with plain HTML fixture.

failureModes.risk: Large detection module slows server startup
failureModes.mitigation: Lazy imports — detection modules only loaded when detect/perf-audit commands called.
All observers use buffered: true. Collection waits for networkidle + 1s settle.

failureModes.risk: Page state changed after perf-audit reload
failureModes.mitigation: Save URL and cookies before reload. On failure: navigate back, return partial results with error field.

failureModes.risk: NetworkEntry missing size/headers for infrastructure analysis
failureModes.mitigation: Use Resource Timing API (performance.getEntriesByType('resource')) as primary data source — has transferSize, encodedBodySize, nextHopProtocol. NetworkEntry is secondary for timing/status.
coverageActive flag resets on context recreation. Clear error if user tries coverage stop after emulation.

failureModes.risk: Resource Timing API buffer overflow (>250 entries)
Detection takes too long on complex pages
failureModes.mitigation: All detections in single page.evaluate(). Each wrapped in try/catch. Target <200ms. Log warning if >500ms.
Unknown apps show as unknown-app (domain.com). Known app domain list covers top 50 apps per platform.

testCoverageMap.codepath: coverage start/stop lifecycle + dead code detection
SaaS detection with app enumeration + constraints
correlation engine (LCP chain, CLS sources, TBT by domain)
perf-audit full orchestration + flags + report formatting

tasks.title: Add initscript write command
tasks.description: Expose BrowserManager.setInitScript() as CLI command with set/clear/show subcommands. Uses IIFE pattern to coexist with domain filter init script. Add case 'initscript' in src/commands/write.ts. Register in WRITE_COMMANDS in src/server.ts:150.
acceptanceCriteria: browse initscript set 'window.__TEST=1' → navigate → browse js 'window.__TEST' returns 1
browse initscript clear removes script from subsequent navigations
browse initscript show returns current script or 'No init script set'
Init script persists across emulate (context recreation)
Init script coexists with domain filter — both execute without conflict

tasks.title: Register initscript in chain, CLI help
tasks.description: Add initscript to WRITE_SET in chain command (src/commands/meta.ts:394). Add to CLI help in src/cli.ts. NOT in SAFE_TO_RETRY.
acceptanceCriteria: browse chain with initscript works end-to-end
browse --help lists initscript under Write commands
initscript NOT in SAFE_TO_RETRY

tasks.title: Add coverage methods to BrowserManager
tasks.description: Add startCoverage(), stopCoverage(), isCoverageActive() to BrowserManager. Uses Playwright page.coverage with resetOnNavigation: false. Processes V8 ranges into per-file used/unused bytes. Coverage flag resets on context recreation.
acceptanceCriteria: startCoverage() enables JS+CSS coverage without throwing
stopCoverage() returns { js, css } with url, totalBytes, usedBytes, unusedBytes, unusedPct per file
stopCoverage() without start throws clear error
coverageActive resets on context recreation
resetOnNavigation: false ensures coverage persists across reload

tasks.title: Add coverage meta command
tasks.description: Add coverage command with start/stop subcommands. Sorted by wasted bytes descending. Register in META_COMMANDS in src/server.ts:162.
acceptanceCriteria: coverage start → goto → coverage stop returns per-file coverage
Output grouped by JS/CSS with per-type and grand totals
Sorted by wasted bytes descending
stop without start returns clear error
Inline scripts shown as [inline]

tasks.title: Register coverage in chain, CLI help, SAFE_TO_RETRY
tasks.description: Add coverage to CLI help and SAFE_TO_RETRY. Verify chain works via meta fallthrough.
acceptanceCriteria: chain with coverage commands works
coverage in SAFE_TO_RETRY
browse --help lists coverage

tasks.title: Create detection module — frameworks.ts (108 frameworks)
tasks.description: Create src/detection/frameworks.ts per plans/perf-audit-frameworks.md reference. 108 frameworks across 12 categories. Deep detection: version, build mode, config depth, hydration analysis, state management, data payloads, perf disease detection. Single batched page.evaluate() call. Each detection in try/catch.
acceptanceCriteria: detectFrameworks(page) runs all detections in single page.evaluate()
React: version, production/dev build mode, concurrent mode, root count
Next.js: __NEXT_DATA__ payload size KB, router type (app/pages), RSC, ISR, dev mode
WordPress: theme name, plugin names from script URLs, jQuery/Migrate, Elementor/WooCommerce/Gutenberg
Magento: RequireJS module count, Knockout bindings, JS bundling status
Laravel: Livewire component + wire:init count, Inertia payload size, Debug Bar, Vite vs Mix
State management: Redux store size KB, MobX/Zustand/Pinia presence
Build tools: Webpack v4/v5 + chunks + source maps, Vite dev mode, Parcel, esbuild, Turbopack
Returns empty array on plain HTML, no exceptions
100+ signatures, <200ms execution

tasks.title: Create detection module — saas.ts (55 platforms)
tasks.description: Create src/detection/saas.ts per plans/perf-audit-platforms.md reference. 55 platforms across 6 categories. Deep detection: app/plugin enumeration with per-app sizing, platform metrics (Liquid render time, RequireJS waterfall, FPC status), constraint mapping.
acceptanceCriteria: detectSaaS(page, networkEntries?) identifies platforms with deep config
Shopify: theme name, app enumeration with per-app URLs and sizes, Liquid render time
WordPress: plugin names from /wp-content/plugins/ paths, per-plugin size, cart-fragments detection
Magento: RequireJS module count + waterfall depth, Knockout bindings, customer section AJAX, FPC status
Wix: platform runtime size KB, marked as cannotFix
Each platform has constraints.canFix and cannotFix populated
50+ signatures, no false positives on plain HTML

tasks.title: Create detection module — infrastructure.ts
tasks.description: Create src/detection/infrastructure.ts. Uses Resource Timing API as primary data source. Detects: CDN (6+ providers with cache status), Protocol (per-resource h1/h2/h3 breakdown), Compression (per-resource-type rates), Caching (hit rate), DNS origins (missing preconnect), Service Worker (strategy detection, navigation preload, cache storage), DOM complexity (node count, depth, subtree), resource hints.
acceptanceCriteria: CDN: 6+ providers, cache status HIT/MISS/STALE
Protocol: per-resource breakdown (e.g., 85% h2, 15% h1.1)
Compression: per-resource-type rates (JS brotli 92%, Images none 60%)
Cache hit rate from transferSize === 0 heuristic
Missing preconnect: lists origins with 2+ resources lacking preconnect
Service Worker: registration, strategy (cache-first/network-first/stale-while-revalidate/unknown), navigation preload, cache summary
DOM complexity: total nodes, max depth, largest subtree, HTML size KB
Valid zeroed results on local test server, no errors

tasks.title: Create detection orchestrator + types (index.ts)
tasks.description: Create src/detection/index.ts with all shared types and detectStack() orchestrator. Runs all 3 detection modules in parallel. Merges React DevTools data when available. Third-party inventory with 30+ known domain classifications.
acceptanceCriteria: detectStack(page) returns StackFingerprint with frameworks, saas, infrastructure, thirdParty
Third-party: 30+ known domains classified (analytics/ads/social/chat/monitoring/consent/other)
Per-domain: category, script count, total size KB
All 3 modules run in parallel via Promise.all
Valid results on static HTML (empty arrays)
React DevTools data merged when enabled

tasks.title: Create Web Vitals collector
tasks.description: Create src/perf-audit/web-vitals.ts. IIFE init script with buffered PerformanceObservers for LCP, CLS, INP, Long Tasks, Paint Timing, Resource Timing. Collection function reads window.__BROWSE_PERF_METRICS. LCP element identification with fetchpriority/loading. Long Task script attribution via containerSrc. TBT calculation.
acceptanceCriteria: IIFE init script, __BROWSE_PERF_METRICS namespace, 6 observer types with buffered: true
Returns { ttfb, fcp, lcp, cls, tbt, inp, lcpElement, layoutShifts[], longTasks[], paintTimings }
LCP element: tag, id, URL, size, fetchpriority, loading attribute
Layout shifts: source element tag/id, shift magnitude
Long Tasks: script URL from attribution[0]?.containerSrc
TBT = sum of (duration - 50ms) per long task
Graceful degradation: partial data on missing observers, no throws

tasks.title: Create resource analyzer
tasks.description: Create src/perf-audit/resource-analyzer.ts. Categorizes resources by type. Image audit (format, dimensions, lazy, fetchpriority, srcset, oversized). Font audit (per-font font-display, preload, FOIT/FOUT). Render-blocking detection (sync scripts, blocking CSS). Uses both NetworkEntry[] and Resource Timing API.
acceptanceCriteria: Per-type categorization: JS, CSS, Images, Fonts, Media, API, Other with count/total size/largest
Image audit: format (PNG/JPG vs WebP), missing width/height, missing lazy below-fold, fetchpriority, srcset usage, oversized (natural > 2x display)
Font audit: per-font family, font-display value, preloaded yes/no, FOIT/FOUT risk
Render-blocking: sync scripts without async/defer, blocking stylesheets without non-blocking media
Third-party size by domain
Empty page returns zeroed categories

tasks.title: Create DOM complexity and correlation engine
tasks.description: Create src/perf-audit/dom-analysis.ts. DOM complexity: node count, max depth, largest subtree. Correlation engine: LCP → image → network entry → blocking CSS chain. Long Task → script → domain attribution with per-domain TBT. CLS source → reason. Font → FCP blocking.
acceptanceCriteria: DOM: totalNodes, maxDepth, largestSubtree {tag, id, descendants}, htmlSizeKB
Nodes > 1500 = warning, > 3000 = critical
LCP correlation: image → network entry (size, duration) → render-blocking chain → critical path with timing
Long Task: per-domain TBT contribution
CLS: per-shift source with reason (font swap, missing dimensions, dynamic content)
Font → FCP: fonts without font-display:swap that loaded before FCP

tasks.title: Create perf-audit orchestrator
tasks.description: Create src/perf-audit/index.ts. Full lifecycle: save state → inject init script → start coverage → reload → wait → collect web vitals → analyze resources → DOM complexity → detect stack → stop coverage → correlate → assemble report. Error recovery: navigate back on failure, return partial results.
acceptanceCriteria: runPerfAudit(bm) does full lifecycle in one call
LCP correlation present in output
includeCoverage: true runs coverage, false skips
fixable vs platformLimitation arrays when SaaS detected
Works on already-loaded page (reload-based)
On failure after reload: partial results with error field

tasks.title: Create perf-audit formatter with platform-aware recommendations
tasks.description: Create src/perf-audit/formatter.ts. 14 report sections. Google Web Vitals thresholds. Platform-specific recommendations: Shopify (app audit), WordPress (plugin audit), Magento (RequireJS bundling). Fixable vs Platform Constraints when SaaS detected. Data-driven Top Recommendations. JSON output mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Web Vitals thresholds: LCP <2.5s, CLS <0.1, INP <200ms, FCP <1.8s, TTFB <800ms good
JSON output is valid structured JSON
3-5 data-driven recommendations, not generic advice
Shopify: app removal suggestions with size savings
WordPress: plugin deactivation suggestions
Magento: RequireJS bundling + customer section recommendations
No SaaS: generic data-driven recommendations
Fixable vs Platform Constraints section only when SaaS detected
